title: Pakistan appeals to Trump to extend deadline, Iran to reopen Hormuz Strait
snippet: Pakistan PM Shehbaz Sharif said diplomatic efforts progressing 'steadily, strongly and powerfully with potential to lead to substantive results'. Asked Trump to extend deadline 2 weeks. Asked Iran to open Hormuz as goodwill gesture.
tag_reason: 파키스탄 중재 외교의 상세 내용 — src-027과 동일 사건이나 Al Jazeera의 추가 인용 포함
